ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of the product (e.g., Whole, Ground, Leaf) */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measure for the product (e.g., kg, g, oz) */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier who provides the product */,
  "product_category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., Spices, Herbs, Blends) */,
  "product_origin" TEXT /* Country or region of origin for the product */,
  "price_per_unit" REAL /* Price per unit of measure for the product */,
  "shelf_life" INTEGER /* Duration the product can be stored before it expires */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the product information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Contact person's name at the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "supplier_website" TEXT /* URL of the supplier's website */,
  "payment_terms" TEXT /* Payment terms agreed with the supplier (e.g., Net 30, Net 60) */,
  "minimum_order_quantity" INTEGER /* Minimum quantity that can be ordered from the supplier */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Time it takes for the supplier to deliver the order */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the supplier information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product sold */,
  "quarter" TEXT /* Quarter of the sales (e.g., Qtr1, Qtr2) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the sales */,
  "sales_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the sales occurred */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Price at which the product was sold */,
  "total_revenue" REAL /* Total revenue generated from the sale */,
  "discount_applied" REAL /* Any discount applied to the sale */,
  "sales_person_id" INTEGER /* ID of the salesperson who made the sale */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the sales record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "region_description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Contact person's name for the region */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the region */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the region */,
  "sales_target" REAL /* Sales target set for the region */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the region information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product in inventory */,
  "current_stock" INTEGER /* Current stock level of the product */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product */,
  "last_stock_check_date" TEXT /* Date of the last stock check */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the last purchase of the product */,
  "next_expected_delivery" TEXT /* Expected date of the next delivery of the product */,
  "safety_stock_level" INTEGER /* Safety stock level to avoid stockouts */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the inventory record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Contact person's name at the customer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the customer is located */,
  "customer_since" TEXT /* Date the customer started doing business with the company */,
  "total_spent" REAL /* Total amount spent by the customer */,
  "loyalty_program_member" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the customer is a member of a loyalty program */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the customer information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer placing the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., Pending, Shipped, Delivered) */,
  "delivery_address" TEXT /* Delivery address for the order */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected date of delivery for the order */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual date of delivery for the order */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Method used for shipping the order (e.g., Express, Standard) */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Cost of shipping the order */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the order information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the order */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the product in the order */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount for the product in the order */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Discount amount for the product in the order */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the order item information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the role (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was created */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the role */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
